name: Position
description: A holding of a financial instrument within an account.

id.description: The unique identifier of the position.

account_id.description: The account the position belongs to.

quantity.description: The quantity of shares held as a decimal string.

average_buy_in_price.description: The average buy-in price as a decimal string.

created_at.description: When the position was first established.

updated_at.description: When the position was last updated.
